## Problem

<!-- What would you like Patchbay to do, and how would you use it? -->

## Scope check
Patchbay intentionally stays small, Windows-only, localhost-only, and avoids a
generic MCP SDK. Does this request fit that scope? (If unsure, that's fine —
explain the use case.)
